next_steps: Serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi (Chagas disease) via ELISA and confirmatory testing
Cardiac PET scan or systemic imaging (chest/abdominal CT) to evaluate for sarcoidosis
Referral for genetic counseling and family screening
Continued adherence to guideline-directed medical therapy for heart failure
Implantation of an ICD for primary prevention of sudden cardiac death given severe LV dysfunction and scar
